name: codex-game-studio
description: A Codex plugin that turns game ideas, design docs, and playable builds into structured studio workflows.

interface.shortDescription: Plan, design, build, test, and ship indie games with Codex.
interface.longDescription: Codex Game Studio adapts the studio-style workflow popularized by Claude Code Game Studios into a Codex plugin with onboarding, design, architecture, production, QA, release, role lenses, template assets, coding rules, and engine-specific references.
defaultPrompt: Find my current game development phase.
Draft a GDD using the game studio templates.
Review my project with the right studio roles.
